org.arakhne.neteditor.figlayout

Class AbstractFigureLayout

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.figlayout.AbstractFigureLayout
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ViewComponentConstants, FigureLayout, FigureLayoutConstants
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    AbstractDirectionBasedFigureLayout, ForceBasedFigureLayout

    public abstract class AbstractFigureLayout
extends Object
implements FigureLayout, FigureLayoutConstants, ViewComponentConstants
    Abstract implementation of a laying out algorithm.
    Version:
    NetEditor Figure Layout $Revision$ 2013-10-23 21:03:08
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-figlayout

    • Constructor Detail

      • AbstractFigureLayout

        public AbstractFigureLayout()

    • Method Detail

      • getMargins

        public Margins getMargins()
        Replies the external padding of each figure. The padding is the minimum amount of space between the figures and the borders of its display area. The value is specified as an Insets object. By default, all nodes has no external padding.
        Returns:
        the external padding.

      • setMargins

        public void setMargins(Margins insets)
        Set the external padding of each figure. The padding is the minimum amount of space between the figures and the borders of its display area. The value is specified as an Insets object. By default, all nodes has no external padding.
        Parameters:
        insets - is the external padding.

      • getOrigin

        public Point2D getOrigin()
        Replies the coordinates of the origin.
        Returns:
        the coordinates of the origin.

      • setOrigin

        public void setOrigin(Point2D point)
        Set the coordinates of the origin.
        Parameters:
        point - is the coordinates of the origin.

      • setOrigin

        public void setOrigin(float x,
             float y)
        Set the coordinates of the origin.
        Parameters:
        x -
        y -
